# AI-hint: GENERATED Quadlet pod for the co-resident group 'mios-webtools' (WS-7 pods-as-SSOT). DO NOT EDIT -- regenerate via tools/generate-pod-quadlets.py from [pods.mios-webtools] in mios.toml. Members (4): mios-webtools-redis, mios-webtools-firecrawl-api, mios-webtools-firecrawl-worker, mios-webtools-crawl4ai.
# AI-related: usr/share/mios/mios.toml, tools/generate-pod-quadlets.py, mios-webtools-redis.container, mios-webtools-firecrawl-api.container, mios-webtools-firecrawl-worker.container, mios-webtools-crawl4ai.container
# /usr/share/containers/systemd/mios-webtools.pod
# FOUR co-located web-service containers in ONE pod (operator 2026-05-24
# "make it a pod"). Replaces the prior fat single-container supervisord
# monolith: each web service is its own container, all joined to this pod
# via `Pod=mios-webtools.pod`. NETWORKING: host networking (Network=host on
# the POD) because (a) the WSL2 podman PublishPort quirk often fails to bind
# private-netns pods on the Windows host, (b) host-net lets the crawl4ai
# member reach the host's ChromeDev CDP at 127.0.0.1:9222, (c) members reach
# each other on host loopback (redis 6379, firecrawl 3002, crawl4ai 11235).
# Network=host publishes nothing, so NO PublishPort here (combining the two
# is a Quadlet/podman error).
# Members (each member .container declares Pod=mios-webtools.pod):
#   mios-webtools-redis
#   mios-webtools-firecrawl-api
#   mios-webtools-firecrawl-worker
#   mios-webtools-crawl4ai
[Unit]
Description='MiOS' web-tools pod (firecrawl api+worker + crawl4ai + redis)
After=network-online.target mios-hermes-browser.service
Wants=network-online.target mios-hermes-browser.service

[Pod]
PodName=mios-webtools
Network=host

[Install]
WantedBy=multi-user.target default.target
